zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux於1370年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓時，她的父親William de Vaux - Lord of Direlton72歲，母親Catherine Douglas - Baroness de Vaux56歲。她於1387年與Patrick de Hepburn在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1412年12月在法國奧維阿利也瓦享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux于1370年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓时，她的父亲William de Vaux - Lord of Direlton72岁，母亲Catherine Douglas - Baroness de Vaux56岁。她于1387年与Patrick de Hepburn在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1412年12月在法国奧維阿利也瓦享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of various places in northern France called Vaux, from the Old French plural of val ‘valley’. Compare English Vause and French Devaux .

History: Richard Vaux (1749–90) emigrated from Sussex, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in early youth. Calvert Vaux, landscape architect, emigrated from London, England, to America in 1850 and designed several major US parks, including Central Park in New York City (with Frederick Olmstead). — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variant Veaux and altered form Devoe ) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vause
meanings: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vaux (see Vaux ), a common French placename, singular and plural of val ‘valley’, the plural form being Latinized in surnames as de Vallibus. Norman lords with this surname are recorded in 12th- and early 13th-century records in Cumberland (Irthington), Devon (Farwood, in Colyton), East Yorkshire (Warter), Essex (Belchamp), and Leicestershire (Belvoir). Compare Vale .

nickname perhaps from Middle English fals, faus, vaus (Old French fals, faus, Old English fals) ‘deceitful, disloyal, dishonest, mendacious’, but it is more likely the name arises from 1, with the common Anglo-Norman French substitution of le for de in their surname.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux was born in 1370, in Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William de Vaux - Lord of Direlton, was 72 and her mother, Catherine Douglas - Baroness de Vaux, was 56. She married Patrick de Hepburn in 1387, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in December 1412, in Vaux, Allier, Auvergne, France, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux est née en 1370, à Dirleton, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Vaux - Lord of Direlton, avait 72 ans et sa mère, Catherine Douglas - Baroness de Vaux, avait 56 ans. Elle a épousé Patrick de Hepburn en 1387, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en décembre 1412, à Vaux, Allier, Auvergne, France, à l’âge de 42 ans.

Sie hat 1387 in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Patrick de Hepburn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. ja.lifeSummary: Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vauxが1370年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンディルレトンで生まれた時，父William de Vaux - Lord of Direltonは72歳，母Catherine Douglas - Baroness de Vauxは56歳であった。1387年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンでPatrick de Hepburnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1412年12月にフランスアウバーグンアリールヴァウックスで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux(이)가 1370년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 디를레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Vaux - Lord of Direlton(은)는 72세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Douglas - Baroness de Vaux(은)는 56세였다. 그녀는 1387년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 Patrick de Hepburn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 12월 프랑스 오버그니 앨리어 바스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux родилась в 1370 г. в местности дирлетон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Vaux - Lord of Direlton было 72 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Douglas - Baroness de Vaux, 56. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Patrick de Hepburn в 1387 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла декабрь 1412 г. в местности ваукс, аллиир, аувиргн, Франция в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux nació en 1370, en Dirleton, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Vaux - Lord of Direlton, tenía 72 años y su mamá, Catherine Douglas - Baroness de Vaux, tenía 56 años. Se casó con Patrick de Hepburn en 1387, en East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en diciembre de 1412, en Vaux, Allier, Auvergne, Francia, a la edad de 42 años.
